Build with EVA

EVA API

Unlock Unmatched Security and Insights with EVA API

EVA’s API empowers developers and platforms to integrate our cutting-edge AI security tools directly into their ecosystems. Built to scale, EVA API delivers unparalleled protection, real-time insights, and advanced functionality, making blockchain trading and development safer and more efficient.

Learn More

Use Cases

Discover a Selection of Our Current API Integrations

Aventa

Integrated the EVA API into their L1 Blockchain Explorer for instant contract auditing.

CPAL

Utilized our API in their trading bot to detect malicious functions in raw contract code.

Padre

Provide comprehensive token audits powered by the EVA API.

RandomDEX

The first project to build on the EVA API, integrating it into the core of their DEX to enhance security.

OTSea

Enhancing the security of their OTC platform audits with our API.

Big Ecosystem

Leveraging our API in their Signal Bot to detect and avoid honeypots.

Business model

Credits System
FEES

Partners

By integrating our cutting-edge API, EVA partners with leading platforms to deliver unparalleled blockchain security to a growing community of users.

Stronger Together

Our Partners

Become an API Partner

EVA API is more than a tool – it’s your partner in building a safer blockchain ecosystem. Whether you’re a DEX, a wallet provider, or a developer looking to integrate cutting-edge security, EVA API gives you the power to protect and innovate.
